---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement (new check, judge adapter, docs, ...)
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem does this solve?**
The use case or gap you're hitting.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see. If it's a new judge adapter or dimension, note the provider/behavior.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you thought about.

**Scope check**
- [ ] This keeps the core deployment-neutral and provider-agnostic (provider/deploy concerns go in
      an adapter or under `examples/`).

**Additional context**
Anything else relevant.
